src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support the new method security architecture in Spring Security 5.7+.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and antMatchers() with requestMatchers() to use the new lambda-based DSL.
Replace deprecated header configuration methods with the new lambda-based headers() DSL and update featurePolicy to permissionsPolicy.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Enable OAuth2 Resource Server support with JWT parsing to replace the custom JWT filter configuration.
Replace the manual CorsFilter injection with a new SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter.
Remove the deprecated configure(WebSecurity) method and move ignored paths into the SecurityFilterChain permitAll rules.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
